features: Hairdressing Comb Set：URAQT hairdressing comb set can help create any hairstyle you like. Include 3 different styles, enough for your daily hair styling needs, ideal for sectioning & styling.
Heat-resistant & Anti-static：The hair combs are made of carbon fiber, anti-static and heat-resistant, lightweight and durable, helps to tame and smooth your frizz hair.
Fine Teeth Comb： Fine teeth comb for sectioning hair into small pieces and smooth hairstyles. Cuspidal design, fine comb teeth, non-slip handle helps you layer hair.

Suitable for Most Hairstyles：Suitable for straight, wet and curly hair. strong and flexible, don't worry break, keep your hair smooth; a Stainless steel tapered tail that allows for fast sectioning, separating and partings.
Great Helper for Salon： Suitable for professional salon and home use. Ideal for hair styling, parting, backcombing, post styling and hair coloring.
description: Product Description URAQT Hair Combs Set -- The best gift for your family. Different styles enough for your styling needs. Different shapes with various widths and densities to meet all sorts of hair styling demands. The whole design incorporates an ergonomic design concept Has a good comfortable grip, strong heat resistance, elasticity, not stick hands. Salon level quality, Made of high-quality plastic, durable enough for long time use. Good for hairstyling with curling iron/straightener or other heat tools. Smooth rounded teeth, comfortable for your daily use or hair styling. Delicate appearance, heat-resistant,anti-static, and durable, it is a good gift for women's friends, ladies, and girls. An essential part of any cosmetologist kit. NO SHARP EDGES Smooth rounded teeth, comfortable for your daily use or hairstyling, Won't scratch your scalp or get caught in knots. STRONG HEAT RESISTANCE Salon level quality, Made of high-quality plastic, durable enough for long time use. FRIENDLY DESIGN The whole design incorporates an ergonomic design concept, has a good comfortable grip, strong heat resistance, elasticity, not stick hands.
